content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "Across 15 turns the coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns. The coach welcomes the grief without judgment (turns 4, 12), does not fight the inner critic about being 'angry at a dead mother' but instead includes it ('that's just the whole truth of it', turn 12), and crucially does NOT validate the drinking as body wisdom or moralize about it — the coach simply stays with the grief and does not take the bait on turn 13's 'isn't this what the body is asking for' (turn 14 redirects to the tender material the client just opened, neither endorsing nor lecturing). No fixing-people moves, no methodology jargon (no view-as-technique or evangelizing), no rapid-fire stacked questions (wonder-as-strategy avoided — questions are spare and connective), and no loving-to-transform escalation. The conversation hasn't yet reached the therapist-referral moment, but at turn 15 it's still mid-flow; not naming the limit yet is a methodology-fidelity question, not an anti-pattern trip. Positive avoidance is visible on turn 14 where the bait was clearly set and the coach declined gracefully.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with a connecting question rather than addressing/fixing the drinking — avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the loneliness with warmth; meets grief without judgment. No loving-to-transform vigor."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the deflection without confronting it; invites meaning rather than extracting."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the contradiction kindly without shaming; no extract-apologies move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Spare question, stays with the client's material."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly welcomes anger at the dead mother — actively avoids dont-shame-your-grief-process and does not fight the inner critic ('shitty thing to feel')."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the 'body's wisdom' bait gracefully — neither validates the drinking as wisdom nor lectures. Redirects to the tender opening. Positive avoidance of the key trap."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "kinked-emotions"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["calibrate-the-threshold", "Is there a grief therapist you can be working with on this?", "What would it be like to feel the grief without the drinking?"],
  "notes": "Therapist-referral and threshold-naming haven't occurred yet; that's a methodology-fidelity concern, not an anti-pattern trip. Within the AoA anti-pattern list, this conversation is clean."
}
